headline: Leidos (LDOS) Stock Dips While Market Gains: Key Facts
summary: Leidos (LDOS) concluded the recent trading session at $146.06, signifying a -1.04% move from its prior day's close.

headline: Does Leidos (LDOS) IFPC Contract Blitz Reveal a Durable Edge in Advanced Defense Technologies?
summary: In April 2026, Leidos announced a new US$617 million U.S. Army award for additional IFPC Inc. 2 air-defense launchers, bringing its total production contracts for the system to nearly US$1.20 billion and more than 100 launchers committed for delivery, alongside continued funding for research, development and testing through 2029. This contract, combined with Leidos’ broader push into AI-enabled defense, grid and autonomy solutions, underscores how the company is tying long-cycle government...

headline: ServiceNow Shares Fall 18% as Solid Earnings Fail to Impress Investors
summary: NOW stock sinks 17.8% as solid Q1 results fail to ease investor fears over geopolitical risks and slowing enterprise deal momentum.
